full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Designing the ablation experiments for ISA components.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What are suitable ablation experiments to test the contribution of specific ISA components — subspace pooling and PCA whitening?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested removing pooling (falling back to ICA) and removing whitening as two clear ablations.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified that these are core components by referencing Section 2.1 and Equation 1 in the paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Implementing the ablated versions of the ISA pipeline.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Write code to run the ISA pipeline without subspace pooling (using raw ICA features) and without PCA whitening, then compare performance.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated the ablation code with proper feature extraction for both ablated versions.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified that the ablated versions correctly remove only the target component while keeping everything else identical.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Added error handling for ICA convergence failure without whitening. Added visualization code.
